t: A pencil is about how many inches long?
e: A pencil is about 7 inches long. 70 or 100 inches would be way too big!

t: A crayon is about how many inches long?
e: A crayon is about 4 inches long. It fits in your hand, so it is small!

t: A paper clip is about how many inches long?
e: A paper clip is tiny! It is about 1 inch long.

t: A ruler is how many inches long?
e: A ruler is 12 inches long. That is the same as 1 foot!

t: Your shoe is about how many inches long?
e: Your shoe is about 8 inches long. That is a little less than a ruler!

t: A door is about how many feet tall?
e: A door is about 7 feet tall. That is taller than most grown-ups!

t: A spoon is about how many inches long?
e: A spoon is about 6 inches long. It fits in your hand!

t: A baseball bat is about how many feet long?
e: A baseball bat is about 3 feet long. That is the same as 36 inches!

t: A bed is about how many feet long?
e: A bed is about 6 feet long. That is big enough for a grown-up to sleep on!

t: A new eraser is about how many inches long?
e: A new eraser is about 2 inches long. It is very small!

t: A fork is about how many inches long?
e: A fork is about 7 inches long. It fits in your hand when you eat!

t: A banana is about how many inches long?
e: A banana is about 8 inches long. It is a little shorter than a ruler!

t: A marker is about how many inches long?
e: A marker is about 5 inches long. It is a little bigger than a crayon!

t: A desk is about how many feet wide?
e: A desk is about 4 feet wide. That is about as long as two rulers!

t: A lunchbox is about how many inches long?
e: A lunchbox is about 10 inches long. It is a little shorter than a ruler!

t: A toothbrush is about how many inches long?
e: A toothbrush is about 7 inches long. It fits in your hand when you brush!

t: A car is about how many feet long?
e: A car is about 15 feet long. That is a lot bigger than you!

t: Your finger is about how many inches long?
e: Your finger is about 3 inches long. It is small, so the number is small too!

t: A key is about how many inches long?
e: A key is about 3 inches long. It is small enough to fit in your pocket!

t: A book is about how many inches tall?
e: A book is about 10 inches tall. That is a little less than a ruler!
